name: Dead End
short_description: This is a very boring driving game where players need to adjust the direction using the left and right arrows and control the brakes with the spacebar. The goal is to choose the right path to keep moving forward and avoid reaching a dead end. Can you make it to the end?
detailed_description:
Overview:
This is an incredibly boring driving adventure game where players control a small car that falls from the sky and navigates the roads. Your task is to make the right choices, avoid driving into a dead end, and reach the destination.↳

The core gameplay includes:↳

  • Driving challenge: Choose the right path to ensure you can keep moving forward.↳

  • Ever-changing roads: The paths change, but not too often.↳

Key features:↳

  • Especially boring, just like your damn life.↳

  • Highly tests patience—have you really thought about why you're moving forward?↳

Goal: Find the correct path and avoid reaching a dead end. But, can you actually achieve this goal?
